---
name: Propose a risk rule
about: Suggest a new exclusion risk/hygiene rule
title: "[rule] <short description>"
labels: rule
---

**What dangerous/poor exclusion should this catch?**
Describe the pattern and a concrete example value.

**Why is it risky? (attacker's-eye view)**
How would an attacker abuse it, or why is it poor hygiene?

**Proposed severity**
critical | high | medium | low | info

**MITRE mapping**
e.g. T1562.001

**References**
Links backing the rationale.

**Match idea**
Which operator(s) from docs/RULE-SCHEMA.md would detect it? Any data-list entries needed?
